analysis.executive_summary: Mercury documentation audit covered 103 pages crawled from 121 requested (100.95% coverage). 3 confirmed broken internal documentation links were identified. API reference coverage is complete at 100% across 83 detected API pages. Example reliability is critically low at 0.0%, and only 63.11% of pages display last-updated metadata. SEO/geo issue rate of 17.23% indicates metadata quality concerns.
strengths: Complete API reference coverage at 100% across 83 API pages with high detection confidence (85%)
Excellent crawl coverage at 100.95% with 95% confidence, indicating comprehensive site structure
Single-product topology provides clear documentation architecture
Zero repository navigation broken links; all broken links are user-facing documentation issues
No crawl trap URLs encountered, suggesting clean URL structure
risks: Example reliability at 0.0% means code samples may be untested, outdated, or non-functional
3 confirmed broken internal documentation links degrade user navigation experience
3 additional links unverified due to authentication/rate-limiting; actual broken link count may be higher
SEO/geo issue rate of 17.23% (approximately 18 pages) impacts discoverability and search ranking
Only 63.11% last-updated coverage leaves 37% of pages with unknown freshness signals
Overall confidence at 71.5% with particularly low links confidence (45%) suggests verification limitations
Low links confidence may hide additional broken or problematic URLs not detected in audit

prioritized_actions.action: Implement automated example testing pipeline to validate all code samples and raise reliability from 0.0%
Fix 3 confirmed broken internal documentation links and investigate 3 unverified URLs requiring authentication
Add last-updated metadata to remaining 37% of pages lacking freshness indicators
Audit and remediate SEO/geo issues on approximately 18 pages (17.23% of corpus)
Implement authenticated link checking to improve links confidence from 45% and verify protected URLs

limitations: External audit cannot execute or validate functionality of code examples; 0.0% reliability score indicates detection limitation, not confirmed failure
3 unverified links blocked by authentication/rate-limiting may be functional; actual broken link count requires internal verification
Crawl limited to public documentation; authenticated or gated content not assessed
SEO/geo issue detection based on metadata presence only; cannot assess content quality or accuracy
Freshness metadata presence verified but not validated against actual content update dates
